posts.title: Startup Statements of Intent
posts.summary: Startup statements of intent have a critical role to play if your new venture has a strong social purpose and the startup seeks to change the world for the better, with benefits for all. In today’s language, you might prefer the term Purpose Statement. There is a moral and ethical leadership void among politicians (according […] The post Startup Statements of Intent appeared first on Venture Founders .
posts.author: Will Keyser
